title: pelargonium × conclausum
intro: Pelargonium × conclusum, commonly known as Red Form Rosette Geranium, is a hybrid species within the geranium family, characterized by its unique rosette shape and vibrant red foliage. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of geraniol, a volatile oil with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × conclusum include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating cold and flu symptoms, and providing relief from digestive issues, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Pelargonium × conclusum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
